title: Display Hearts (DH)
description: Displays players' hearts under their name. Works with half hearts and yellow (absorption) hearts too. Optimized to the max
body:
Displays the life hearts of all players below their names. Also displays half hearts and yellow hearts (absorb effect when eating a golden or enchanted apple). Half hearts are shown in a darker color because there is no half heart emoji.

![Hearts Under the Player's Name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1893208f674b614993e06d59a6406b51b8f4f9f7.png)

Any questions or proposals, you can send an email to 00pdj00@gmail.com.
